missions.title: Rabalder Rally
missions.task: Find the concrete skate bowls at Rabalder Park. Your entire team must strike a synchronized skater pose on the edge of a ramp. Action shot required  -  everyone off the ground? Legendary bonus.

missions.title: Factory Face-Off
missions.task: Race to the old concrete walls. Find the wildest piece of graffiti or mural. Recreate it with your bodies  -  same poses, same expressions. Take a side-by-side photo. First team to post it in chat wins the speed bonus.

missions.title: Skrammel Challenge
missions.task: The junk playground! Build something that represents Klaudusia using ONLY found materials here  -  tires, wood, pipes, ropes. Spell her name, make a crown, build a throne. Photo of your creation required.

missions.title: Rock Star Moment
missions.task: Your team is headlining Ragnarock TONIGHT. Pose as a legendary rock band on the museum steps. Someone must be the lead singer (mic pose), someone on air guitar, someone on drums. No actual instruments  -  pure air performance.

missions.title: The Orange Stage
missions.location: Orange Scene replica / open stage area
missions.task: Find the mini Orange Stage. Your team must perform a 30-second 'Happy Birthday' in the most dramatic way possible. Opera? Death metal? Whisper-rap? The stage is yours. Film it.

missions.title: Creature of
missions.task: Find any sculpture, art piece, or weird object in . Your team must become a 5-headed creature with it  -  everyone physically connected (arms linked, stacked, hugging). The weirder the creature, the better.

missions.title: Time Capsule
missions.task: As a team, record a 20-second video message to Klaudusia from the future  -  10 years from now. What do you hope she remembers about today? What do you wish for her? Be sincere, be funny, be you.

missions.title: The Birthday Offering
missions.task: Using ONLY found natural objects (nothing bought, nothing picked from live plants  -  sticks, stones, fallen leaves), create a gift for Klaudusia. Spell her name. Build a crown. Make a portrait. Then find the Gamemaster to present it!
